idea-plugin.name: Copy With Reference
idea-plugin.description:
Copy selected code with file path and line numbers to clipboard.

Format optimized for pasting to Claude Code / ChatGPT:

@src/main/UserService.java:42-58
```java
public User findById(Long id) {
    return repository.findById(id).orElseThrow(...);
}
```

Features

  • Right-click in editor → Copy with File Reference
  • Automatically detects selected lines range
  • If no selection, copies the current line
  • Includes language tag in code fence based on file extension

action.description: Copy selected code with file path and line numbers, formatted for Claude Code / ChatGPT
